---
title: "EPA & CLEANinCLE Analysis - Summer 2025"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
  word_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    reference_docx: default
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center", fig.width = 8, fig.height = 6, dpi = 300
)

# Create figure folder
if (!dir.exists("figs")) dir.create("figs")
```



```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(geosphere)
library(GGally)
library(gridExtra)
library(broom)

```

## EPA data: load, clean, and organize

```{r epa-load}

epa_sites <- c("0034","0038","0045","0060","0065","0073")
epa_file_tpl <- function(site) sprintf("epa_pm25_site_%s.csv", site)

# CLEANinCLE raw file 
cinc_path <- "~/Documents/R_Projects/Air_pollution_Projects/CLEANinCLE_Raw_Air_Quality_Data_2024-11-2025-05.csv"

# ---- OUTPUT folders ----
dir.create("tables", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create("figs",   showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)


```




```{r}
# Daily FRM (24‑hr) and FEM (1‑hr -> daily mean)
epa_24hr_daily <- epa_all %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  group_by(site_number, date_local) %>%
  summarise(pm25 = mean(sample_measurement, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(Date = as.Date(date_local), Site = site_number, PM25_FRM = pm25)

epa_fem_daily <- epa_all %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  group_by(site_number, date_local) %>%
  summarise(pm25 = mean(sample_measurement, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(Date = as.Date(date_local), Site = site_number, PM25_FEM = pm25)

# EPA site coordinates
epa_coords <- epa_all %>%
  distinct(site_number, latitude, longitude) %>%
  group_by(site_number) %>%
  summarise(
    Latitude  = mean(latitude,  na.rm = TRUE),
    Longitude = mean(longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(Site = site_number)

# Save tables
write_csv(epa_24hr_daily, "tables/epa_24hr_daily.csv")
write_csv(epa_fem_daily,  "tables/epa_fem_daily.csv")
write_csv(epa_coords,     "tables/epa_site_coords.csv")

```

#CLEANinCLE
```{r}
stopifnot(file.exists(cinc_path))

cinc_raw <- read_csv(cinc_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
names(cinc_raw) <- tolower(names(cinc_raw))

cinc_pm <- cinc_raw %>%
  filter(measure_name %in% c("pm25","pm2.5","mc_pm2_5")) %>%
  mutate(
    datetime = ymd_hms(time, quiet = TRUE),
    date     = as.Date(datetime)
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    device_number = as.character(device_number),
    date, pm25 = value,
    latitude, longitude, device_eui, location_name
  )

cinc_locations <- cinc_pm %>%
  distinct(device_number, device_eui, location_name, latitude, longitude)

cinc_daily <- cinc_pm %>%
  group_by(device_number, date) %>%
  summarise(pm25 = mean(pm25, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

write_csv(cinc_locations, "tables/cinc_device_locations.csv")
write_csv(cinc_daily,     "tables/cinc_daily_pm25.csv")

```

```{r}

# Nearest EPA site for each CinC device
device_to_epa <- cinc_locations %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    epa_site = epa_coords$Site[which.min(
      geosphere::distHaversine(
        c(longitude, latitude),
        cbind(epa_coords$Longitude, epa_coords$Latitude)
      )
    )]
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv(device_to_epa, "tables/cinc_to_epa_nearest.csv")
```


```{r}
# Convenience for joins
cinc_daily_map <- cinc_daily %>%
  left_join(device_to_epa %>% select(device_number, epa_site), by = "device_number")

# A) CinC vs EPA Continuous (daily avg) — all overlap days
tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont <- cinc_daily_map %>%
  inner_join(epa_fem_daily, by = c("epa_site" = "Site", "date" = "Date")) %>%
  rename(
    Site         = epa_site,
    Date         = date,
    PM25_CinC    = pm25,
    PM25_EPA_FEM = PM25_FEM
  ) %>%
  arrange(Site, Date, device_number)

# B) CinC vs EPA Continuous on FRM days only
frm_dates <- epa_24hr_daily %>% distinct(Date)

tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm <- cinc_daily_map %>%
  inner_join(epa_fem_daily %>% semi_join(frm_dates, by = "Date"),
             by = c("epa_site" = "Site", "date" = "Date")) %>%
  rename(
    Site         = epa_site,
    Date         = date,
    PM25_CinC    = pm25,
    PM25_EPA_FEM = PM25_FEM
  ) %>%
  arrange(Site, Date, device_number)

# C) CinC vs EPA FRM (24‑hr)
tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm <- cinc_daily_map %>%
  inner_join(epa_24hr_daily, by = c("epa_site" = "Site", "date" = "Date")) %>%
  rename(
    Site         = epa_site,
    Date         = date,
    PM25_CinC    = pm25,
    PM25_EPA_FRM = PM25_FRM
  ) %>%
  arrange(Site, Date, device_number)

# Save
write_csv(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont,         "tables/cinc_vs_epa_cont_daily.csv")
write_csv(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm,  "tables/cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm_days.csv")
write_csv(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm,          "tables/cinc_vs_epa_frm_24hr.csv")

# Peek
list(
  cont_head   = dplyr::slice_head(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont, n = 5),
  contFRM_head= dplyr::slice_head(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm, n = 5),
  frm_head    = dplyr::slice_head(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm, n = 5)
)


```

```{r}
per_site_stats <- function(df, x_col, y_col, site_col = "Site") {
  df %>%
    rename(.x = {{x_col}}, .y = {{y_col}}) %>%
    filter(is.finite(.x), is.finite(.y)) %>%
    group_by(.data[[site_col]]) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      slope = if (n > 2) coef(lm(.y ~ .x))[2] else NA_real_,
      intercept = if (n > 2) coef(lm(.y ~ .x))[1] else NA_real_,
      r2 = if (n > 2) summary(lm(.y ~ .x))$r.squared else NA_real_,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    rename(!!site_col := 1)
}

```

```{r figA-plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=9}
figA_table <- readr::read_csv("tables/figA_epa_fem_vs_frm_table.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# Per-site labels with equation & R²
lab_tbl <- figA_table %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    slope = if (n() > 2) coef(lm(PM25_FEM ~ PM25_FRM))[2] else NA_real_,
    intercept = if (n() > 2) coef(lm(PM25_FEM ~ PM25_FRM))[1] else NA_real_,
    r2 = if (n() > 2) summary(lm(PM25_FEM ~ PM25_FRM))$r.squared else NA_real_,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    label = ifelse(is.finite(r2),
                   sprintf("y = %.2fx %+ .2f\nR² = %.2f", slope, intercept, r2),
                   "n < 3")
  ) %>%
  # same label anchor for all panels
  mutate(x = figA_table$panel_min[1] + (figA_table$panel_max[1]-figA_table$panel_min[1])*0.03,
         y = figA_table$panel_max[1] - (figA_table$panel_max[1]-figA_table$panel_min[1])*0.06)

lims <- c(figA_table$panel_min[1], figA_table$panel_max[1])

ggplot(figA_table, aes(PM25_FRM, PM25_FEM)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.9) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.0, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  coord_equal(xlim = lims, ylim = lims, expand = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, ncol = 3) +
  geom_text(data = lab_tbl, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "EPA Continuous (FEM daily avg) vs EPA FRM (24‑hr) — by Site",
    x = expression("EPA FRM PM"[2.5]*" (µg/m"^3*")"),
    y = expression("EPA Continuous PM"[2.5]*" (µg/m"^3*")")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(6)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(6)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
ggsave("figs/figA_epa_fem_vs_frm_by_site.png", width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 320)

```

```{r plot-cinc-epa-cont, fig.width=13,fig.height=10}
df <- readr::read_csv("tables/cinc_vs_epa_cont_daily.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# Axis (robust)
lim_hi <- quantile(c(df$PM25_EPA_FEM, df$PM25_CinC), probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
lims   <- c(0, max(5, ceiling(lim_hi/5)*5))

lab_tbl <- per_site_stats(df, PM25_EPA_FEM, PM25_CinC) %>%
  mutate(
    label = ifelse(is.finite(r2),
                   sprintf("y = %.2fx %+ .2f\nR² = %.2f", slope, intercept, r2),
                   "n < 3"),
    x = lims[1] + diff(lims)*0.03,
    y = lims[2] - diff(lims)*0.06
  )

ggplot(df, aes(PM25_EPA_FEM, PM25_CinC)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75, size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.0, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  coord_equal(xlim = lims, ylim = lims, expand = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, ncol = 3) +
  geom_text(data = lab_tbl, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "CLEANinCLE vs EPA Continuous (daily avg) — by Site",
    x = expression("EPA Continuous PM"[2.5]*" (µg/m"^3*")"),
    y = expression("CLEANinCLE PM"[2.5]*" (µg/m"^3*")")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(6)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(6)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
ggsave("figs/cinc_vs_epa_cont_by_site.png", width = 13, height = 10, dpi = 320)

```

```{r plot-cinc-epa-frm, fig.width=13,fig.height=10}
df <- readr::read_csv("tables/cinc_vs_epa_frm_24hr.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

lim_hi <- quantile(c(df$PM25_EPA_FRM, df$PM25_CinC), probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
lims   <- c(0, max(5, ceiling(lim_hi/5)*5))

lab_tbl <- per_site_stats(df, PM25_EPA_FRM, PM25_CinC) %>%
  mutate(
    label = ifelse(is.finite(r2),
                   sprintf("y = %.2fx %+ .2f\nR² = %.2f", slope, intercept, r2),
                   "n < 3"),
    x = lims[1] + diff(lims)*0.03,
    y = lims[2] - diff(lims)*0.06
  )

ggplot(df, aes(PM25_EPA_FRM, PM25_CinC)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75, size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.0, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  coord_equal(xlim = lims, ylim = lims, expand = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, ncol = 3) +
  geom_text(data = lab_tbl, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "CLEANinCLE vs EPA FRM (24hr) — by Site",
    x = expression("EPA FRM PM"[2.5]*" (µg/m"^3*")"),
    y = expression("CLEANinCLE PM"[2.5]*" (µg/m"^3*")")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(6)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(6)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
ggsave("figs/cinc_vs_epa_frm_by_site.png", width = 13, height = 10, dpi = 320)

```

```{r plot-cinc-epa-cont-on-frm, fig.width=13, fig.height=10}
df <- readr::read_csv("tables/cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm_days.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

lim_hi <- quantile(c(df$PM25_EPA_FEM, df$PM25_CinC), probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
lims   <- c(0, max(5, ceiling(lim_hi/5)*5))

lab_tbl <- per_site_stats(df, PM25_EPA_FEM, PM25_CinC) %>%
  mutate(
    label = ifelse(is.finite(r2),
                   sprintf("y = %.2fx %+ .2f\nR² = %.2f", slope, intercept, r2),
                   "n < 3"),
    x = lims[1] + diff(lims)*0.03,
    y = lims[2] - diff(lims)*0.06
  )

ggplot(df, aes(PM25_EPA_FEM, PM25_CinC)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75, size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.0, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  coord_equal(xlim = lims, ylim = lims, expand = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, ncol = 3) +
  geom_text(data = lab_tbl, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "CLEANinCLE vs EPA Continuous (on FRM days) — by Site",
    x = expression("EPA Continuous PM"[2.5]*" (µg/m"^3*")"),
    y = expression("CLEANinCLE PM"[2.5]*" (µg/m"^3*")")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(6)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(6)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
ggsave("figs/cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm_by_site.png", width = 13, height = 10, dpi = 320)
```



```{r}
dir.create("tables", showWarnings = FALSE)

# --- Per-site summaries for each comparison ---
summ_cont <- per_site_stats(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont,          PM25_EPA_FEM, PM25_CinC) %>%
  rename(Site = Site)
summ_cont_on_frm <- per_site_stats(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm, PM25_EPA_FEM, PM25_CinC) %>%
  rename(Site = Site)
summ_frm  <- per_site_stats(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm,           PM25_EPA_FRM, PM25_CinC) %>%
  rename(Site = Site)

readr::write_csv(summ_cont,         "tables/summ_cinc_vs_epa_cont_per_site.csv")
readr::write_csv(summ_cont_on_frm,  "tables/summ_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm_per_site.csv")
readr::write_csv(summ_frm,          "tables/summ_cinc_vs_epa_frm_per_site.csv")


```


```{r}
# For reproducibility, compute the robust limits the same way you do for plots
axis_limits <- tibble::tibble(
  figure = c("CinC_vs_EPA_Cont", "CinC_vs_EPA_FRM", "CinC_vs_EPA_Cont_on_FRM"),
  min = 0,
  max = c(
    max(5, ceiling(quantile(c(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont$PM25_EPA_FEM, tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont$PM25_CinC), 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)/5)*5),
    max(5, ceiling(quantile(c(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm$PM25_EPA_FRM, tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm$PM25_CinC), 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)/5)*5),
    max(5, ceiling(quantile(c(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm$PM25_EPA_FEM, tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm$PM25_CinC), 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)/5)*5)
  )
)

readr::write_csv(axis_limits, "tables/figure_axis_limits.csv")


```

```{r}


# 0) make sure output folder exists
dir.create("tables", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# 1) Helper to pick first / middle / last rows per group
pick_first_mid_last <- function(df_group) {
  n <- nrow(df_group)
  if (n == 0) return(df_group[integer(0), , drop = FALSE])
  idx <- unique(stats::na.omit(c(1L, ceiling(n/2), n)))
  df_group[idx, , drop = FALSE]
}

# 2) Choose up to 3 rows per site from your already-built table
#    (tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm has: Site, Date, device_number, PM25_CinC, PM25_EPA_FRM)
spot_rows_frm <- tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Site, Date) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Site) %>%
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pick_first_mid_last(.x)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

# 3) Pull "source-of-truth" values from original daily tables
#    Join to EPA FRM (24-hr) and CinC daily averages
spot_check_frm <- spot_rows_frm %>%
  # EPA FRM from the raw daily table
  dplyr::left_join(
    epa_24hr_daily %>%
      dplyr::rename(PM25_EPA_FRM_src = PM25_FRM),
    by = c("Site" = "Site", "Date" = "Date")
  ) %>%
  # CinC daily from the raw daily table
  dplyr::left_join(
    cinc_daily %>%
      dplyr::rename(PM25_CinC_src = pm25),
    by = c("Date" = "date", "device_number" = "device_number")
  ) %>%
  # Keep the key fields + side-by-side compare columns
  dplyr::select(
    Site, Date, device_number,
    PM25_EPA_FRM_table = PM25_EPA_FRM, PM25_EPA_FRM_src,
    PM25_CinC_table    = PM25_CinC,    PM25_CinC_src
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Site, Date, device_number)

# 4) Save + quick peek
readr::write_csv(spot_check_frm, "tables/spotcheck_tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm.csv")
dplyr::glimpse(spot_check_frm)

```




```{r}
tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm_wR2 <- tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm %>%
  left_join(summ_frm %>% select(Site, n, slope, intercept, r2),
            by = "Site")

readr::write_csv(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm_wR2, "tables/cinc_vs_epa_frm_24hr_with_site_stats.csv")
```

```{r}

dir.create("tables", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

pick_first_mid_last <- function(df_group) {
  n <- nrow(df_group)
  if (n == 0) return(df_group[integer(0), , drop = FALSE])
  idx <- unique(stats::na.omit(c(1L, ceiling(n/2), n)))
  df_group[idx, , drop = FALSE]
}

spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_frm <- tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Site, Date) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Site) %>%
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pick_first_mid_last(.x)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, device_number, PM25_EPA_FRM, PM25_CinC)

readr::write_csv(spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_frm,
                 "tables/spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_frm.csv")
spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_frm

# B) Spot‑check for CinC vs EPA Continuous (daily avg)

spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_cont <- tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Site, Date) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Site) %>%
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pick_first_mid_last(.x)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, device_number, PM25_EPA_FEM, PM25_CinC)

readr::write_csv(spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_cont,
                 "tables/spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_cont.csv")
spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_cont


# C) Spot‑check for CinC vs EPA Continuous (on FRM days)

spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm <- tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Site, Date) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Site) %>%
  dplyr::group_modify(~ pick_first_mid_last(.x)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, device_number, PM25_EPA_FEM, PM25_CinC)

readr::write_csv(spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm,
                 "tables/spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm.csv")
spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_cont_on_frm


#

# Example for FRM:
lims_hi <- quantile(c(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm$PM25_EPA_FRM, tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm$PM25_CinC),
                    probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
lims <- c(0, max(5, ceiling(lims_hi/5)*5))

frm_stats <- tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Site) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    r2 = if (n() > 2) summary(lm(PM25_CinC ~ PM25_EPA_FRM))$r.squared else NA_real_,
    panel_min = lims[1], panel_max = lims[2],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_frm_wstats <- spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_frm %>%
  dplyr::left_join(frm_stats, by = "Site")

readr::write_csv(spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_frm_wstats,
                 "tables/spotcheck_cinc_vs_epa_frm_wstats.csv")

```

```{r}
write_csv(
  per_site_stats(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_frm, PM25_EPA_FRM, PM25_CinC),
  "tables/summary_cinc_vs_epa_frm_r2.csv"
)

write_csv(
  per_site_stats(tbl_cinc_vs_epa_cont, PM25_EPA_FEM, PM25_CinC),
  "tables/summary_cinc_vs_epa_cont_r2.csv"
)

```

```{r}
# Inspect current columns
names(epa_24hr_daily); names(epa_fem_daily)

# Rename to the expected names if they're still "PM25"
if (exists("epa_24hr_daily") && "PM25" %in% names(epa_24hr_daily) && !"PM25_FRM" %in% names(epa_24hr_daily)) {
  epa_24hr_daily <- dplyr::rename(epa_24hr_daily, PM25_FRM = PM25)
}
if (exists("epa_fem_daily") && "PM25" %in% names(epa_fem_daily) && !"PM25_FEM" %in% names(epa_fem_daily)) {
  epa_fem_daily <- dplyr::rename(epa_fem_daily, PM25_FEM = PM25)
}

# Re‑run the sanity checks
stopifnot(exists("epa_fem_daily"), exists("epa_24hr_daily"))
stopifnot(all(c("Date","Site","PM25_FEM") %in% names(epa_fem_daily)))
stopifnot(all(c("Date","Site","PM25_FRM") %in% names(epa_24hr_daily)))



library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

stopifnot(exists("epa_all"))

# 24‑hr FRM daily
epa_24hr_daily <- epa_all %>%
  dplyr::filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(site_number, date_local) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(pm25 = mean(sample_measurement, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::transmute(Date = as.Date(date_local), Site = site_number, PM25_FRM = pm25)

# 1‑hr FEM aggregated to daily
epa_fem_daily <- epa_all %>%
  dplyr::filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(site_number, date_local) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(pm25 = mean(sample_measurement, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::transmute(Date = as.Date(date_local), Site = site_number, PM25_FEM = pm25)

# Verify
stopifnot(all(c("Date","Site","PM25_FRM") %in% names(epa_24hr_daily)))
stopifnot(all(c("Date","Site","PM25_FEM") %in% names(epa_fem_daily)))


# ---- EPA FEM vs FRM: joined table + per-site stats ----
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

# sanity checks
stopifnot(exists("epa_fem_daily"), exists("epa_24hr_daily"))
stopifnot(all(c("Date","Site","PM25_FEM") %in% names(epa_fem_daily)))
stopifnot(all(c("Date","Site","PM25_FRM") %in% names(epa_24hr_daily)))

# 1) Join to put FEM & FRM on the same row for each Site/Date
epa_fem_vs_frm <- inner_join(
  epa_fem_daily  %>% select(Date, Site, PM25_FEM),
  epa_24hr_daily %>% select(Date, Site, PM25_FRM),
  by = c("Date","Site")
) %>%
  arrange(Site, Date)

# 2) Per-site regression stats (slope, intercept, R², n)
epa_fem_vs_frm_stats <- epa_fem_vs_frm %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    dat <- .x
    n <- nrow(dat)
    if (n > 2) {
      fit <- lm(PM25_FEM ~ PM25_FRM, data = dat)
      tibble(
        n         = n,
        slope     = unname(coef(fit)[2]),
        intercept = unname(coef(fit)[1]),
        r2        = summary(fit)$r.squared
      )
    } else {
      tibble(n = n, slope = NA_real_, intercept = NA_real_, r2 = NA_real_)
    }
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# 3) (Optional) add common axis limits you’ve been using in plots
lim_hi <- quantile(c(epa_fem_vs_frm$PM25_FEM, epa_fem_vs_frm$PM25_FRM), 0.995, na.rm = TRUE)
lims   <- c(0, max(5, ceiling(lim_hi/5)*5))
epa_fem_vs_frm_stats <- epa_fem_vs_frm_stats %>%
  mutate(axis_min = lims[1], axis_max = lims[2])

# 4) Save both tables
dir.create("tables", showWarnings = FALSE)
write_csv(epa_fem_vs_frm,       "tables/epa_fem_vs_frm_daily.csv")
write_csv(epa_fem_vs_frm_stats, "tables/summary_epa_fem_vs_frm_r2.csv")

# quick peek
dplyr::slice_head(epa_fem_vs_frm, n = 5)
dplyr::slice_head(epa_fem_vs_frm_stats, n = 6)

```
```{r fig-spatial-agreement, fig.width=10, fig.height=7, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(geosphere)

# ---- Helper: R² vs distance (robust, no lm warnings) ----
compute_r2_vs_distance <- function(wide_df, coords_df, id_col = "Site", label = "") {
  stopifnot(all(c(id_col, "Latitude", "Longitude") %in% names(coords_df)))
  sites <- sort(setdiff(names(wide_df), "Date"))

  # Pairwise R² using correlation^2 (skip diagonals; keep unique unordered pairs)
  r2_tbl <- purrr::map_dfr(sites, function(s1){
    purrr::map_dfr(sites, function(s2){
      if (s1 == s2) return(tibble(Site1 = s1, Site2 = s2, R2 = NA_real_))
      dfp <- wide_df %>% select(x = all_of(s1), y = all_of(s2)) %>% drop_na()
      r2  <- if (nrow(dfp) > 2) cor(dfp$x, dfp$y)^2 else NA_real_
      tibble(Site1 = s1, Site2 = s2, R2 = r2)
    })
  }) %>%
    filter(Site1 != Site2) %>%
    rowwise() %>% mutate(pair_id = paste(sort(c(Site1, Site2)), collapse = "-")) %>%
    ungroup() %>% distinct(pair_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(-pair_id)

  coords_min <- coords_df %>%
    distinct(.data[[id_col]], Latitude, Longitude)

  # NOTE: names in 'by' must be columns in x (r2_tbl), values in y (coords_min):
  r2_tbl %>%
    left_join(coords_min, by = setNames(id_col, "Site1")) %>%
    rename(lat1 = Latitude, lon1 = Longitude) %>%
    left_join(coords_min, by = setNames(id_col, "Site2")) %>%
    rename(lat2 = Latitude, lon2 = Longitude) %>%
    mutate(
      Distance_km = distHaversine(cbind(lon1, lat1), cbind(lon2, lat2)) / 1000,
      Dataset = label
    ) %>%
    select(Site1, Site2, Distance_km, R2, Dataset)
}

# ---- Example: EPA FRM (24-hr) ----
# assumes epa_24hr_wide has columns: Date, "0034","0038","0045","0060","0065","0073"
# and epa_coords has columns: Site, Latitude, Longitude
epa_frm <- compute_r2_vs_distance(
  wide_df  = epa_24hr_wide,
  coords_df = epa_coords,
  id_col   = "Site",
  label    = "EPA FRM (24-hr)"
)

# ---- Plot ----
ggplot(epa_frm, aes(Distance_km, R2)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Spatial Agreement vs. Distance between EPA Sites",
    subtitle = "Pairwise R² of daily PM2.5 vs. distance",
    x = "Distance (km)",
    y = expression(R^2)
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

```{r fig-cinc-r2-distance, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=5}

# ---- R² vs. distance for CLEANinCLE devices (robust to NA/duplicate names) ----
library(tidyverse)
library(geosphere)

stopifnot(exists("cinc_wide"), exists("cinc_locations"))

# 1) Keep only numeric device columns; sanitize their names
wide <- cinc_wide
date_col <- intersect(names(wide), c("date","Date"))
if (length(date_col) == 1) wide <- wide %>% relocate(all_of(date_col))

dev_cols_raw <- names(wide)[sapply(wide, is.numeric)]
# drop NA/blank column names
dev_cols <- dev_cols_raw[!is.na(dev_cols_raw) & nzchar(dev_cols_raw)]

wide_mat <- wide %>% select(all_of(dev_cols))

# make names syntactically valid & unique, keep a lookup to original device_number
safe_names <- make.names(dev_cols, unique = TRUE)
name_map   <- tibble(safe = safe_names, device_number = dev_cols)
names(wide_mat) <- safe_names

# 2) Coordinates for devices present (use original IDs)
coords <- cinc_locations %>%
  mutate(device_number = as.character(device_number)) %>%
  distinct(device_number, latitude, longitude) %>%
  filter(device_number %in% name_map$device_number)

# 3) Pairwise R² with a minimum overlap
compute_r2_tbl <- function(wide_numeric, min_overlap = 10){
  devs <- names(wide_numeric)
  out <- vector("list", length = length(devs) * (length(devs)-1) / 2)
  k <- 0
  for (i in seq_along(devs)) {
    for (j in seq.int(i+1, length(devs))) {
      d1 <- devs[i]; d2 <- devs[j]
      if (is.na(d1) || is.na(d2)) next
      x <- wide_numeric[[d1]]; y <- wide_numeric[[d2]]
      ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
      n_ok <- sum(ok)
      r2 <- if (n_ok >= min_overlap) summary(lm(y[ok] ~ x[ok]))$r.squared else NA_real_
      k <- k + 1
      out[[k]] <- tibble(dev_safe_1 = d1, dev_safe_2 = d2, n_overlap = n_ok, R2 = r2)
    }
  }
  bind_rows(out)
}

r2_pairs_safe <- compute_r2_tbl(wide_mat, min_overlap = 10) %>%
  filter(!is.na(R2))

# 4) Map back to original device_number, add distances
r2_pairs <- r2_pairs_safe %>%
  left_join(name_map, by = c("dev_safe_1" = "safe")) %>%
  rename(device1 = device_number) %>%
  left_join(name_map, by = c("dev_safe_2" = "safe")) %>%
  rename(device2 = device_number)

r2d <- r2_pairs %>%
  left_join(coords, by = c("device1" = "device_number")) %>%
  rename(lat1 = latitude, lon1 = longitude) %>%
  left_join(coords, by = c("device2" = "device_number")) %>%
  rename(lat2 = latitude, lon2 = longitude) %>%
  mutate(Distance_km = distHaversine(cbind(lon1, lat1), cbind(lon2, lat2))/1000) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Distance_km), is.finite(R2))

# 5) Plot
p_cinc_r2_dist <- ggplot(r2d, aes(Distance_km, R2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linetype = "dashed", color = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title   = "Spatial Agreement vs. Distance between CLEANinCLE Devices",
    subtitle= "Pairwise R² of daily PM2.5 vs. distance",
    x = "Distance (km)", y = expression(R^2)
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

if (!dir.exists("figs")) dir.create("figs", recursive = TRUE)
ggsave("figs/cinc_r2_vs_distance.png", p_cinc_r2_dist, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
p_cinc_r2_dist
```

```{r}
# --- Generate Table A2: CLEANinCLE Sensor Locations and Operation Dates ---

library(tidyverse)

# Load your CLEANinCLE device location file
# (replace path with your actual file name if different)
cinc_loc <- read_csv("tables/cinc_device_locations.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# Clean up and keep key columns
cinc_table <- cinc_loc %>%
  select(
    Device_ID = device_number,
    Location_Name = location_name,
    Latitude = latitude,
    Longitude = longitude
  ) %>%
  arrange(Device_ID)

# Add a placeholder column for Dates of Operation
cinc_table <- cinc_table %>%
  mutate(Dates_of_Operation = "Nov 2024 – May 2025")  # update specific sensors later if needed

# Save to CSV (you can open this in Excel and format it)
write_csv(cinc_table, "tables/Table_A2_CLEANinCLE_sensor_locations.csv")

# View the table in R
print(cinc_table)

  library(writexl)
write_xlsx(cinc_table, "cinc_table.xlsx")
```

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

# 1. Keep only PM2.5 measurements
cinc_pm25 <- cinc_raw %>%
  filter(measure_name == "mc_pm2_5")

# 2. Convert timestamps to dates (drops hours/minutes)
cinc_pm25 <- cinc_pm25 %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(time))

# 3. Calculate daily average PM2.5 for every device and day
# This automatically includes all device numbers
cinc_daily <- cinc_pm25 %>%
  group_by(device_number, latitude, longitude, Date) %>%
  summarise(Concentration_measurements = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 4. Reorder and rename columns to match Patricia’s format
cinc_for_Patricia <- cinc_daily %>%
  rename(
    `Device #` = device_number,
    Latitude = latitude,
    Longitude = longitude,
    Date = Date,
    `Concentration measurements` = Concentration_measurements
  ) %>%
  select(`Device #`, Date, `Concentration measurements`, Latitude, Longitude)

# 5. Save as CSV
write_csv(cinc_for_Patricia, "CinC_for_Patricia.csv")
```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

# 1. Keep only PM2.5 measurements
cinc_pm25 <- cinc_raw %>%
  filter(measure_name == "mc_pm2_5")

# 2. Convert timestamps to dates
cinc_pm25 <- cinc_pm25 %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(time))

# 3. Filter for December 1–10, 2024
cinc_pm25 <- cinc_pm25 %>%
  filter(Date >= as.Date("2024-12-01") & Date <= as.Date("2024-12-10"))

# 4. Calculate daily average PM2.5 for each device
cinc_daily <- cinc_pm25 %>%
  group_by(device_number, latitude, longitude, Date) %>%
  summarise(Concentration_measurements = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 5. Format columns for Patricia
cinc_for_Patricia <- cinc_daily %>%
  rename(
    `Device #` = device_number,
    Latitude = latitude,
    Longitude = longitude,
    Date = Date,
    `Concentration measurements` = Concentration_measurements
  ) %>%
  select(`Device #`, Date, `Concentration measurements`, Latitude, Longitude)

# 6. Save as CSV
write_csv(cinc_for_Patricia, "CinC_for_Patricia_Dec1to10_2024.csv")

```


```{r}
pair3 <- cinc_daily %>%
  filter(device_number %in% c(21, 24)) %>%
  select(Date, device_number, Concentration_measurements)

library(tidyr)

pair3_wide <- pair3 %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = device_number, values_from = Concentration_measurements,
              names_prefix = "Device_") %>%
  drop_na(Device_21, Device_24)


library(ggplot2)

ggplot(pair3_wide, aes(x = Device_21, y = Device_24)) +
  geom_point(color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Pair 3: Device 21 vs Device 24 (CLEANinCLE PM2.5)",
    x = "Device 21 PM₂.₅ (µg/m³)",
    y = "Device 24 PM₂.₅ (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
summary(lm(Device_24 ~ Device_21, data = pair3_wide))$r.squared


```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
